subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and beseemeth the Peerless All-Knowing One, Who hath endowed the sun with radiance and bestowed upon light its splendor from the ocean of pearls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد دانای یکتا را لایق و سزاست که شمس را ضیا بخشید و نور را بها از بحر لولو
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @personal instructions, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
